title: origanum sabulicola
intro: Origanum sabulicola, also known as the dune marjoram or sand marjoram, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reducing fever. The health benefits of Origanum sabulicola include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and act as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
